description: The parties in a lawsuit have reached a settlement. An attorney needs to draft the settlement agreement to formalize the terms.

nodes.task_description: Review the settlement term sheet to understand the key terms (e.g., settlement amount, release of claims).

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all the agreed-upon terms.

nodes.task_description: Select the firm's standard settlement agreement template.
Draft the agreement, incorporating the specific settlement terms and including standard clauses like confidentiality and no admission of liability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a comprehensive draft settlement agreement.
